name: add-a-line
description: A low-friction notebook for work in progress on macOS
author: Add a Line

scripts.package:mac: npm run build:icons && electron-packager . "Add a Line" --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 --out=dist --overwrite --icon=assets/AppIcon.icns --app-bundle-id=com.tianyibi.addaline --app-version=1.6.0 --build-version=9 --extend-info=build/Info.plist --prune=true --ignore='^/(dist|tests|screenshots|native)$' && bash scripts/finalize-app.sh
